sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32307" key="e)kla/lhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκλᾰ´λ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n32307.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">uttering,</tr_> condemned by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:147" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.147</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
